misc: Regularly competes in the Finnish Mid Tour as well with decent results
biography: Sami, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a wealth of experience to the greens. Representing Hirsala Golf, Sami is known for his calm demeanor and strategic approach to the game.

While the Hector Trophée title has eluded him thus far, Sami has been a consistent competitor in this tournament for seven years. Moreover, he regularly tests his mettle in the Finnish Mid Tour, achieving commendable results that speak to his dedication and skill.
With another Hector Trophée appearance on the horizon in 2026, we anticipate that Sami will bring his best game forward in what will be his eighth showing at the event.
